name: Depot Service Item
query: SELECT i.name AS "Item Code:Link/Item:170", i.item_name AS "Item Name:Data:220", i.item_group AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:200", i.service_unit AS "Service Unit:Data:110", i.is_depot_package AS "Package:Check:80", i.stock_uom AS "UOM:Data:90", i.disabled AS "Disabled:Check:80" FROM `tabItem` i WHERE i.item_group IN ('Standard Depot Handling Charge','Testing Charges','Survey Fee','Exterior Cleaning Fee','Cleaning Cost','Interior Shell - Special Requirement','Repair & Spare Parts','Depot Packages') ORDER BY i.item_group, i.name
